title: Ice Cube Tray with Lid and Tong, 3 Packs 45 Cubes, Silicone Ice Cube Trays Reusable and BPA Free for Whiskey, Cocktail, Drinks&Baby Food, Freezer, Souper(Pink+Blue+Green)
features: 🍉Food-Grade Silicone Material: Material are Made of premium food-grade Silicone,Ice Trays are nontoxic, food-grade, sanitary and quality-assured trays, please rest assured to use the ice cube trays to make DIY

🍒Removable Lids & 100% Sealed - To avoid diluting the flavor and being contaminated in the refrigerator, we use removable silicone lids. For the reason that the volume will increase during the freezing process, and ice trays with covers

🍋Quick & Flexible Ice Removal: Each ice cube trays includes 15 cubes,3 pack in total 45 cubes,the anti adhesion design at the bottom make it easier to release ice cubes. Simply get ice cubes out by pushing the bottom without bending or twisting.

🍹Easy to Use & Multifunction DIY: Applicable to -104℉ ~ 446℉/-40ºC~230ºC, soft silicone materials won't crack or break even after long freezing. This set of silicone ice cube trays is not limited to make ice, it's also ideal for making all
🍇Dishwasher Safe& Reusable: These ice cube trays are reusable and washable, they can be placed safely in the dishwasher, leaves your hands free and save your time.
description: Product Description Safe and Reliable Made of food grade silicone which is BPA free, It is great for freezing homemade baby food and for portioning out small treats like chocolates, peanut butter cups, popsicles, or anything you want divided into mini yet mighty portions. Make Delicious Fruit Cubes Simply cut very thin slices of fruit, place them into your ice cube tray, and pour water in. You can make any flavor as desired. It can also be used to make ice cream, ice sucker, juice, jam or even to be a container for any of your need Easy Releasing and Cleaning Due to the extremely high flexibility of silica gel, silicone ice trays are soft and can be bent as you wish. Readymade ice cubes can be easily released from the ice trays as they won’t stick to the trays. It is also easier to clean the stain at the bottom after use.
